rationale: Independently re-verified both completeness gates against head ade250ef. (1) Enumerated all 458 paths of `git diff --name-only 2cfed766 ade250ef` and classified each with a faithful replication of the real predicates (isDocFile, isProcessArtifact incl. isMoverRunState/isVestigialConfigDrop, excludedFirstSegments) + the four OWNERSHIP.yaml glob sets at head: 449 docs, 4 mover/vestigial process artifacts, 5 workflow-OWNED source (internal/instruct/templates/spec.md + internal/validate/{divergence,divergence_test,docsync,layout_classifier_test}.go), ZERO unowned. The only non-.mindspec/non-project-docs paths are exactly those 8 (4 root docs + 4 validate files) — no stray top-level file, no unexpected path. spec.md declares workflow as an Impacted Domain, so the 5 owned files attribute (not unowned) at the real gate. (2) Repo-wide markdown-link scan: zero live links resolve into the vacated .mindspec/docs/ , docs/ , review/ trees (outside docs_archive); zero dead. No regression. The isDocFile fix is precise (exact-name rootOperatorDocs map, not any-top-level-.md) and proven by TestRootOperatorDocsNotUnowned's negative guard. go build/vet/test ./internal/validate/... + gofmt all green.

findings.issue: All 458 base..head paths classify as 449 docs + 4 process artifacts (.mindspec/lineage, .mindspec/migrations/*, .mindspec/policies.yml) + 5 workflow-OWNED source (internal/instruct/**, internal/validate/**). Zero unowned; no stray/unexpected top-level path. complete will pass adr-divergence-unowned.

spec.md Impacted Domains declares workflow (+core/execution/context-system), so candidateDomains includes workflow and the 5 owned files attribute rather than flag unowned at the real gate (consistent with R2 history where only README/BENCH-MOVED, not the .go files, surfaced).

Repo-wide markdown-link scan (git ls-files *.md, excl docs_archive): zero live links resolve into .mindspec/docs/ , docs/ , or review/; zero dead. Round-1/2 link hard_block remains ADDRESSED, no regression.

isDocFile uses exact-name rootOperatorDocs={CLAUDE,AGENTS,README,BENCH-MOVED}.md, not an any-top-level-.md rule. TestRootOperatorDocsNotUnowned asserts internal/foo.go stays source and is the sole unowned finding end-to-end; root docs do not leak. go build ./..., go vet + go test ./internal/validate/..., gofmt -l all clean.
